---
title: "Class Exercise 2"
author: "Pamela Afful"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## 

Class Exercise 2

```{r}
# Read in the data
library(dplyr)
pk_df=read.csv('pokemon.csv')
View(pk_df)
```

```{r}
#| echo: true
#names(pk_df)
pk_df %>% select(c(abilities,against_bug,against_dark,abilities))
```

```{r}
pk_df %>% select(c(-abilities))
```

```{r}
pk_df %>% select(starts_with("against"))
```

```{r}
pk_df %>% filter(against_bug>=1 | against_dark>=1 )
```

```{r}
pk_df %>% arrange(against_bug)
```

```{r}
pk_df %>%  select(c(1,against_bug,3)) %>% 
  arrange(against_bug,against_bug )
```

```{r}
pk_df %>% mutate(proportion= height_m/weight_kg) %>% 
  select(height_m,weight_kg,proportion)
```

```{r}
pk_df %>% summarize(ave_against_bug=mean(against_bug))
```

```{r}
pk_df %>% group_by(type1) %>% 
  summarize(ave_against_bug=mean(against_bug)) %>% 
  arrange(desc(ave_against_bug))

```
